text: Randomized controlled pilot trial of a supplement for sleep quality. n=24 adults. Placebo-controlled. p<0.05 for one self-reported sleep score. Effect size was not reported. Follow-up lasted two weeks.

draft.bottomLine: This small randomized trial found a short-term improvement in one sleep score, but the sample was very small and the effect size is not clear.

whatPaperActuallyShows.observedResult: One short-term sleep score improved versus placebo

keyFindings.finding: One self-reported sleep score improved after two weeks.
keyFindings.plainEnglishMeaning: The supplement may help a little in the short term, but the study is too small to be decisive.
